feat.name: Weapon Master
feat.description: You have practiced extensively with a variety of weapons, gaining the following benefits./nIncrease your Strength or Dexterity score by 1, to a maximum of 20./nYou gain proficiency with four weapons of your choice. Each one must be a simple or a martial weapon.

feat.name: Charger
feat.description: When you use your action to Dash, you can use a bonus action to make one melee weapon attack or to shove a creature. If you move at least 10 feet in a straight line immediately before taking this bonus action, you either gain a +5 bonus to the attack’s damage roll (if you chose to make a melee attack and hit) or push the target up to 10 feet away from you (if you chose to shove and you succeed).

abilities.name: Darkvision
abilities.description: Tus ojos estan adaptados para mirar a 60f de distancia.

abilities.name: Fey Ancestry
abilities.description: Tienes resistencia a los estados de <Encantado> y  a <Sueño>.

abilities.name: Entrenamiendo en armas Elficas
abilities.description: Tienes proficiencia en armas de tipo <longsword>,<shortword>,<shortbow> and <longbow>.

abilities.name: Dwarven Resilience
abilities.description: You have advantage on saving throws against poison, and you have resistance against poison damage.

abilities.name: Dwarven Combat Training
abilities.description: You have proficiency with the battleaxe, handaxe, light hammer, and warhammer.

abilities.name: Tool Proficiency
abilities.description: You gain proficiency with the artisan's tools of your choice: smith's tools, brewer's supplies, or mason's tools.

abilities.name: Stout Resilience
abilities.description: You have advantage on saving throws against poison, and you have resistance to poison damage.

abilities.name: Lucky
abilities.description: When you roll a 1 on an attack roll, ability check, or saving throw, you can reroll the die. You must use the new result, even if it is a 1.

abilities.name: Brave
abilities.description: You have advantage on saving throws against being frightened.

abilities.name: Nimble
abilities.description: You can move through the space of any creature that is of a size larger than yours.

abilities.name: Draconic Ancestry
abilities.description: You are distantly related to a particular kind of dragon. Choose a type of dragon from the below list; this determines the damage and area of your breath weapon, and the type of resistance you gain.

abilities.name: Breath Weapon
abilities.description: You can use your action to exhale destructive energy. It deals damage in an area according to your ancestry.

abilities.name: Damage Resistance
abilities.description: You have resistance to the damage type associated with your ancestry.

abilities.name: Hellish Resistance
abilities.description: You have resistance to fire damage.

abilities_class.name: Fighting_Style
abilities_class.description: You adopt a particular style of fighting as your specialty. Choose one of the following options. You can't take a Fighting Style option more than once, even if you later get to choose again.

abilities_class.name: Second_Wind
abilities_class.description: You have a limited well of stamina that you can draw on to protect yourself from harm. On your turn, you can use a bonus action to regain hit points equal to 1d10 + your fighter level. Once you use this feature, you must finish a short or long rest before you can use it again.

abilities_class.name: Action_Surge
abilities_class.description: you can push yourself beyond your normal limits for a moment. On your turn, you can take one additional action.

abilities_class.name: Action_SurgeX2
abilities_class.description: you can push yourself beyond your normal limits for a moment. On your turn, you can take one additional action.  You can use it twice before a rest, but only once on the same turn.

abilities_class.name: Martial_Archetype
abilities_class.description: At 3rd level, you choose an archetype that you strive to emulate in your combat styles and techniques. The archetype you choose grants you features at 3rd level and again at 7th, 10th, 15th, and 18th level.

abilities_class.name: Extra_Attack
abilities_class.description: You can attack twice, instead of once, whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.

abilities_class.name: Extra_AttackX2
abilities_class.description: You can attack twice, instead of once, whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.

abilities_class.name: Extra_AttackX3
abilities_class.description: You can attack twice, instead of once, whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.

abilities_class.name: Indomitable
abilities_class.description: Beginning at 9th level, you can reroll a saving throw that you fail. If you do so, you must use the new roll, and you can't use this feature again until you finish a long rest.

abilities_class.name: Rage
abilities_class.description: n battle, you fight with primal ferocity. On your turn, you can enter a rage as a bonus action.

abilities_class.name: Unarmored_Defense
abilities_class.description: While you are not wearing any armor, your armor class equals 10 + your Dexterity modifier + your Constitution modifier. You can use a shield and still gain this benefit.

abilities_class.name: Danger_Sense
abilities_class.description: At 2nd level, you gain an uncanny sense of when things nearby aren't as they should be, giving you an edge when you dodge away from danger. You have advantage on Dexterity saving throws against effects that you can see, such as traps and spells. To gain this benefit, you can't be blinded, deafened, or incapacitated.

abilities_class.name: Reckless Attack
abilities_class.description: Starting at 2nd level, you can throw aside all concern for defense to attack with fierce desperation. When you make your first attack on your turn, you can decide to attack recklessly. Doing so gives you advantage on melee weapon attack rolls using Strength during this turn, but attack rolls against you have advantage until your next turn.

abilities_class.name: Primal_Path
abilities_class.description: At 3rd level, you choose a path that shapes the nature of your rage. Your choice grants you features at 3rd level and again at 6th, 10th, and 14th levels.

abilities_class.name: Fast_Movement
abilities_class.description: Starting at 5th level, your speed increases by 10 feet while you aren't wearing heavy armor.

abilities_class.name: Feral_Instinct
abilities_class.description: your instincts are so honed that you have advantage on initiative rolls. Additionally, if you are surprised at the beginning of combat and aren't incapacitated, you can act normally on your first turn, but only if you enter your rage before doing anything else on that turn.

abilities_class.name: Brutal Critical
abilities_class.description: Beginning at 9th level, you can roll one additional weapon damage die when determining the extra damage for a critical hit with a melee

abilities_class.name: Brutal Critical+
abilities_class.description: Beginning at 9th level, you can roll two additional weapon damage die when determining the extra damage for a critical hit with a melee

abilities_class.name: Brutal Critical++
abilities_class.description: Beginning at 9th level, you can roll three additional weapon damage die when determining the extra damage for a critical hit with a melee

abilities_class.name: Brutal Critical++
abilities_class.description: Beginning at 9th level, you can roll three additional weapon damage die when determining the extra damage for a critical hit with a melee

razas.name: Alto_Elfo
razas.description: Ágiles y con gran afinidad mágica.

razas.name: Mediano
razas.description: Lo mismo que el Enano con ENANISMOOO pero CON MAS ENANISMO

razas.name: Draconido
razas.description: He's a freaking human-dragon with a lot of swagger.
